title: 'Not end of war': Iran supreme leader Mojtaba Khamenei cautions as Iran agrees to two-week ceasefire with US
summary_full: Iran's Supreme Leader ordered a ceasefire after a month of conflict, stating it's not the end of the war. This move follows a stern warning from Trump and Iran's conditions for a lasting resolution, including sanctions relief and compensation. Tehran also pledged not to pursue nuclear weapons if its terms are met.
